old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","title":"Let puck own STM32WL watchdog startup","description":"Discovered by project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8. On Nucleo WL55JC, Zephyr STM32 IWDG auto-starts during POST_KERNEL with CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=100 ms before puck main calls wdt_init() and requests 4000 ms. Renode reaches the 100 ms expiry before main, causing reset loops; the same pre-main timing race exists on physical firmware. Set the puck board configuration to disable watchdog auto-start so puck wdt_init remains the sole owner of arming and feeding it.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Canonical physical and Renode Nucleo puck configs resolve CONFIG_WDT_DISABLE_AT_BOOT=y while CONFIG_WATCHDOG and CONFIG_IWDG_STM32 remain enabled. 2. Physical and Renode builds link. 3. Renode no longer resets at 100 ms and logs puck watchdog armed at 4000 ms. 4. Late puck runtime/radio oracle is rerun without weakening it. 5. Three independent code reviews find no correctness regression.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.229172Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.229172Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.354074Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.463451Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","title":"Let puck own STM32WL watchdog startup","description":"Discovered by project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8. On Nucleo WL55JC, Zephyr STM32 IWDG auto-starts during POST_KERNEL with CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=100 ms before puck main calls wdt_init() and requests 4000 ms. Renode reaches the 100 ms expiry before main, causing reset loops; the same pre-main timing race exists on physical firmware. Set the puck board configuration to disable watchdog auto-start so puck wdt_init remains the sole owner of arming and feeding it.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Canonical physical and Renode Nucleo puck configs resolve CONFIG_WDT_DISABLE_AT_BOOT=y while CONFIG_WATCHDOG and CONFIG_IWDG_STM32 remain enabled. 2. Physical and Renode builds link. 3. Renode no longer resets at 100 ms and logs puck watchdog armed at 4000 ms. 4. Late puck runtime/radio oracle is rerun without weakening it. 5. Three independent code reviews find no correctness regression.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.229172Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:41.207438Z","started_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:41.207438Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-16T21:51:41.207438Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:41.207438Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.354074Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.463451Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"1. Canonical physical and Renode Nucleo puck configs resolve CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=4000 while CONFIG_WATCHDOG and CONFIG_IWDG_STM32 remain enabled and WDT_DISABLE_AT_BOOT remains unset. 2. Physical and Renode builds link. 3. Renode no longer resets at 100 ms. 4. Late puck runtime oracle is rerun without weakening it. 5. Three independent reviews find no correctness regression.","description":"Discovered by project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8. Zephyr STM32 IWDG auto-starts during POST_KERNEL with CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=100 ms. Renode reaches that expiry before puck main, while puck itself requests 4000 ms. Set the Nucleo puck initial watchdog timeout to 4000 ms so pre-main watchdog coverage remains active and the application later takes over with the same timeout.","notes":"Initial CONFIG_WDT_DISABLE_AT_BOOT approach was rejected after review because it removed pre-main watchdog coverage. Final design keeps auto-start and changes its timeout to 4000 ms, matching puck wdt_init().","title":"Set Nucleo puck boot watchdog to 4s"}

Physical and Renode builds link. 3. Renode no longer resets at 100 ms. 4. Late puck runtime oracle is rerun without weakening it. 5. Three independent reviews find no correctness regression.","notes":"Initial CONFIG_WDT_DISABLE_AT_BOOT approach was rejected after review because it removed pre-main watchdog coverage. Final design keeps auto-start and changes its timeout to 4000 ms, matching puck wdt_init().","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.229172Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:31.546769Z","started_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:41.207438Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-16T21:51:41.207438Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:41.207438Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.354074Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:46:26.463451Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Final validation 2026-07-16: CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=4000 replaces the rejected disable-at-boot approach. Clean physical ELF/config SHA-256 12e42f8ed3c4704022455f80362aae07bdcc4c8562084d347a6c6ec645771201 / 54a4377810313dd469ff856f6dab3a4bbf899e41bc6a7e8bda3f95200dff602e. Clean Renode ELF/config eed7d1c7caceb3783f0b95e8fd94d6abfd0527319d5beccc785a54e8fa9033dd / 06bd6165d04ccc4fcbe92c2c7f512a4d7352b66dce6754c6ed3a7e7c984efc9e. Both resolve CONFIG_WATCHDOG=y, CONFIG_IWDG_STM32=y, CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=4000, and WDT_DISABLE_AT_BOOT unset. Real Renode IWDG run started the machine, connected LoRa, read identity, and did not produce the former 100 ms watchdog reset. Late app progress remains blocked by missing RNG model project-LICHEN-oqv7.8. Three independent final reviews found no defects. Separate project-LICHEN-5ix1.6 and .7 track uptime-wrap and setup-failure robustness."}
Set boot IWDG to 4000 ms while preserving pre-main coverage; physical/Renode builds and 100 ms runtime regression pass.
